query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_mismatch,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pt.amount = 0 AND COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pattern_zero_amount_with_penalty,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pt.amount > 0 AND COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) > 0 
       AND COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) = 0
       AND COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) = 0
       THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pattern_only_penalty_nonzero_amount
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE ABS(pt.amount - (
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) -
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0)
)) > 0.01;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_mismatch,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pt.amount = 0 AND COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pattern_zero_amount_with_penalty,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pt.amount > 0 AND COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) > 0 
       AND COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) = 0
       AND COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) = 0
       THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pattern_only_penalty_nonzero_amount
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE ABS(pt.amount - (
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) +
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0) -
    COALESCE(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.discount_amount') AS DECIMAL(15,2)), 0)
)) > 0.01;
